_note: Golden fixture for #3442 enum/registry 5-runtime parity. Each key names a registry surface; value is the expected full membership set (sorted). Structural-N/A exceptions are documented inline.

github-actor-team-map.description: inventory/github-actor-team-map.json actors values — the team slugs that appear as values
github-actor-team-map.structuralNANote: Actor login keys are env-specific (e.g. cursoragent, codex-agent); only the team-slug values are validated for parity

governance-manifest-schema-targets-enum.description: inventory/governance-manifest.schema.json targets items enum — the harness runtimes plus legacy cline/continue entries
governance-manifest-schema-targets-enum.structuralNANote: cline and continue remain in the enum for backward compat with existing sample units; parity check only verifies the 5 canonical runtimes are present

governance-rules-cursor-applicability.description: config/governance-rules.yaml — rules with explicit runtime lists must include cursor
governance-rules-cursor-applicability.structuralNANote: Rules using cross_runtime_applicability: [all] (single-status-invariant, client-identity-never-signer, ticket-first, dormant-deferred-epic-only) already cover all runtimes via the all sentinel

runtime-side-effect-guard-ALLOWLIST.description: scripts/global/runtime-side-effect-guard.js ALLOWLIST keys — runtimes with a commandId surface
runtime-side-effect-guard-ALLOWLIST.structuralNANote: copilot operates via github-actions runner and has no local commandId surface; vscode-extension is a legacy non-runtime key retained for backward compat
